titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to saʿd Ibn ṭarif Al-Khiffaf
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to saʿd Ibn ṭarif Al-Khiffaf

segments: ه عن سعد بن طريف الخفّاف‌ فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه‌ عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن الهيثم بن أبي مسروق النّهديّ، عن الحسين بن علوان، عن عمرو بن ثابت، عن سعد بن طريف الخفّاف.
arabic.text: ه عن سعد بن طريف الخفّاف‌ فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه‌ عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن الهيثم بن أبي مسروق النّهديّ، عن الحسين بن علوان، عن عمرو بن ثابت، عن سعد بن طريف الخفّاف.

segments: And whatever is narrated from Saʿd ibn Ṭarif Al-Khiffaf, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah, from Al-Haytham ibn Abi Masruq Al-Nahdi, from Al-Husayn ibn Alwan, from Amr ibn Thabit, from Saʿd ibn Ṭarif Al-Khiffaf.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: And whatever is narrated from Saʿd ibn Ṭarif Al-Khiffaf, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah, from Al-Haytham ibn Abi Masruq Al-Nahdi, from Al-Husayn ibn Alwan, from Amr ibn Thabit, from Saʿd ibn Ṭarif Al-Khiffaf.

titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to saʿd Ibn ṭarif Al-Khiffaf

segments: تمّت أسانيد كتاب من لا يحضره الفقيه بحمد اللّه و منّه، و الصّلاة على محمّد و آله الطاهرين‌.
arabic.text: تمّت أسانيد كتاب من لا يحضره الفقيه بحمد اللّه و منّه، و الصّلاة على محمّد و آله الطاهرين‌.

segments: The chains of transmission for the book Man La Yahḍuruhu Al-Faqih have been completed by the grace and favor of Allah (swt), and blessings be upon Muhammad and his pure family.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: The chains of transmission for the book Man La Yahḍuruhu Al-Faqih have been completed by the grace and favor of Allah (swt), and blessings be upon Muhammad and his pure family.
